

**Styleguide**

*for the*

Saigon Equities Forum

*![][image1]*

*Effective February 25, 2026* 

# **Quick Access**

*![][image2]*

\#00845D (Main)

**Fonts**: CINZEL for logo, Inter Light for headings & paragraphs, Arial for graphs  
**Reports Font Size**: Inter Light 9  
**Internal Docs Font Size**: Inter Normal 11  
**Docx. Graph Font Size**: Arial 4

**Figma**: [Here](https://www.figma.com/design/wgeoK7cwnQFqZwZxrIMjY0/Saigon-Equities-Forum?node-id=21-2&t=mlCxv7qMY04adNck-0)

# **Purpose**

SEF prides itself on professional-grade reporting and research. We amplify years of experience in academia research, and finance presents an opportunity for us to present the best of our ability in presenting clear, factual information. 

For many, SEF’s comprehensive, clean, and clear style makes our reports a compelling and satisfying read, with some preferring us over the presentation style of other industry and club peers.

There are many benefits to knowing how to make clean and beautiful design. Following style guides and making ourselves uncomfortable with design is an opportunity to train our eyes and become a valuable asset to our managers, colleagues, and clients. Moreover, presenting information in a clear manner and flow helps synergy among collaborators, in reducing the time and energy needed to catch up and understand material.

After all, a better presentation in turn wins approval and the trust of many who will become catalysts to your career.

**As a result, we must strictly follow established aesthetic norms and Wall Street industry standards. Failure to follow can result in delays of your publication, and even a cancellation.**
